name: Heaven and Earth
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core apples; cut into quarters. Add sugar and simmer without water slowly until the apples are soft.
2. Wash and peel potatoes; cook until done.
3. Mix salt, nutmeg, egg yolk, and butter to form a puree.
4. Cut sausage into slices and fry on both sides.
5. Grease a souffle pan and layer with apples, potato puree, and sausage slices. Cover with sliced onions. Bake at 200°C for about 20 minutes.
